---
subparagraph: yes
execute:
  echo: false
geometry:
  - top=20mm
  - left=20mm
  - right=20mm
  - bottom=20mm
format:
    quarto-cv-pdf: 
        keep-tex: true
        keep-md: true
        pdf-engine: lualatex
author: Frederick J. Boehm
date: last-modified
phone: 715-252-3929
address: "University of Michigan · 419 Waymarket DR · Ann Arbor, Michigan 48103 · USA"
email: frederick.boehm@gmail.com
fontsize: 12pt
github: fboehm # github account
orcid: 0000-0002-1644-5931 # orcid identifier
#osf: ymqui # osf five character id
#twitter: twitter # twitter handle
web: fboehm.us
fontawesome: yes
nocite: '@*'
validate-yaml: false
engine: jupyter
---


```{python}
import yaml
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, display_latex

with open("data/boehm-fixed.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)

n_references = len(data['references'])

for ref_number in range(n_references):
    ref = data['references'][ref_number]
    author_yaml = ref['author']
    author = ''
    for i in range(len(author_yaml)):
        if i == 0:
            author = author_yaml[i]
        elif i == len(author_yaml) - 1:
            author = author + ' and ' + author_yaml[i]
        else:
            author = author + ', ' + author_yaml[i]
    display(Markdown(f"{author}"))

    title = ref['title']
    journal = ref['container-title']
    # Apply formatting & styling based on your requirements
    formatted_value = f"**{value}**" if key == 'important_key' else value

    # Print the formatted content as Markdown
    print(f"## {key}\n\n{formatted_value}\n\n")

# Replace 'your_yaml_file.yaml' with the actual path to your YAML file
print_yaml_as_markdown('bib2yaml/boehm.yaml')
```
